name: Six Flags Magic Mountain
description: Six Flags Magic Mountain, formerly known and colloquially referred to as simply Magic Mountain, is a 209 acre amusement park located in Valencia, California, 35 mi northwest of downtown Los Angeles.  It opened on May 29, 1971, as a development of the Newhall Land and Farming Company and Sea World Inc.  In 1979, Six Flags purchased the park and added "Six Flags" to the park's name.
imageAttribution: The entrance archway to the park in 2014
